issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing adapters or failed commands.
The skill is limited to Linux environments and does not support other operating systems.

scenarios.name: capture-wpa2-handshake
scenarios.rationale: Response B includes more of the required commands (airmon-ng check kill, airmon-ng start, airodump-ng with channel and BSSID, and airmon-ng stop) but still omits the interface type check and handshake verification step, whereas Response A lacks even more of the specified commands.

scenarios.name: gpu-crack-hc22000
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fail to include the exact required commands as specified in the rubric.
